title: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
summary: 该项目提供了一个单一的 CLAUDE.md 文件，旨在改善 Claude Code 的行为。该文件基于 Andrej Karpathy 对 LLM 编码陷阱的观察，通过配置提示来减少常见错误，提升代码生成质量。
summary_en: This project provides a single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. It configures prompts to reduce common errors and enhance code generation quality.
